thresholds.tau_rule: threshold from Data Lead train-only predictions for M2_ols

val_period.note: Hyperparameters tuned via expanding-window CV on train only; no separate held-out val set exported.

methodology_config.entry_exit: event window aligned to target (t0-5 -> t0+60)

selection_reason: Data Lead confirmed switching the website model to M2_ols because it has the second-highest selection score and avoids native LightGBM/OpenMP deployment risk. The selection score combines directional accuracy, clipped Sharpe-like performance and clipped R-squared.
selection_rule: Selection score = 0.40 * directional_accuracy + 0.35 * sharpe_like_clipped + 0.25 * r2_clipped; thresholds come from train-only predictions; walkforward_mode=expanding_refit_fixed_hparams.
date_range_note: The final website demo uses simulated scenario rows and the exported walk-forward sample, so it is no longer constrained to the earlier 2020-2024-only range.
surprise_timing: surprise is not available at the present release decision time; this is an event-window model, not a fully pre-release trading model.
